tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode features. Document key functionalities, strengths, and unique features in a competitive analysis report.

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze copilot-cli features and capabilities. Document key functionalities, strengths, and unique features in a competitive analysis report.

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../opencode to analyze OpenCode features. Document key functionalities, strengths, and unique features in a competitive analysis report.

tasks.title: Analyze Roocode Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze roocode features and capabilities. Document key functionalities, strengths, and unique features in a competitive analysis report.

tasks.title: Product Review and Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Review our current product thoroughly. Compare it with competitor analyses from tasks s1-s4. Identify missing features and gaps in our product.

tasks.title: Create Feature Implementation Plan
tasks.description: Based on the gap analysis, create a comprehensive plan with milestones and specific tasks for implementing the missing features. Organize by priority and estimated complexity.

tasks.title: Generate SWARMOUT2.md Document
tasks.description: Compile all analysis and plans into a final document called SWARMOUT2.md. Include executive summary, competitor analysis, gap analysis, and implementation roadmap. Save in target/temp/swarmout directory.
